diffCoverage.notes: Single layer touched (command). Login/listen logic refactored into a shared login_and_listen helper; file commands reuse zalo login/send.

findings.evidence: New commands live in the command layer and delegate to zalo (login/profile_of/start_message_listener); no zca-rust types leak above zalo. The std::fs read is plain file I/O in the command layer, acceptable as a dev affordance until a config/store-layer credential source replaces it.
findings.fix: When secure-cred-store lands, move credential acquisition into the store layer and have the command call that, keeping file I/O out of command.

summary: Single-layer (command) change that refactors login/listen into a shared helper and adds file-backed variants delegating to zalo. Forward-only layering preserved; zca-rust stays in zalo. The file read is a documented dev affordance to be relocated to the store layer with secure-cred-store. Approve.
